steps.title: Parallel lines share the same slope
steps.content: The given line $y = 36x + 6$ has slope $36$. Parallel lines have equal slopes, so line $s$ also has slope $36$. Line $s$ passes through $(0, 0)$, giving: $$y = 36x.$$

steps.title: Evaluate at x = 9
steps.content: Substitute $x = 9$: $$d = 36(9) = 324.$$ That matches choice 324 — 324 is correct.
